points.title: 🚀 Data Migration
points.desc: Migrated 500+ Oracle tables to Snowflake using AWS DMS and S3 with high data accuracy.

points.title: 📊 Data Validation
points.desc: Implemented validation framework using Redshift Spectrum to ensure data consistency.

points.title: 🌐 Data Challenges
points.desc: Resolved encoding issues involving Japanese, UTF-8, and special characters.

points.title: ⚡ Performance Optimization
points.desc: Optimized queries, file formats, and warehouse configurations.

role: Data Engineer | US Retail & Healthcare Domain

points.title: 🚀 Scalable Data Pipeline Development
points.desc: Engineered and maintained 25+ enterprise-grade ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Databricks for seamless data ingestion and transformation between Azure Data Lake and Snowflake.

points.title: 🏗️ Modern Data Architecture (Medallion Framework)
points.desc: Designed and implemented a robust Bronze–Silver–Gold data architecture in Snowflake to enable structured data processing, improved data reliability, and business-ready analytics layers.

points.title: 📊 Advanced Data Transformation & Quality Engineering
points.desc: Developed complex transformation logic including deduplication (ROW_NUMBER), type standardization, lifecycle filtering, and validation frameworks to ensure high data accuracy and consistency.

points.title: ⚡ Real-Time Data Ingestion & Incremental Processing
points.desc: Built event-driven ingestion pipelines using Snowpipe and implemented Streams & Tasks for automated incremental data processing, reducing manual intervention and improving data freshness.

points.title: 🎯 Campaign & Customer Data Engineering
points.desc: Delivered data solutions for campaign execution and customer analytics by enabling reliable audience processing, campaign workflows, and performance measurement pipelines.

points.title: 🛠️ Production Stability & Reliability Engineering
points.desc: Strengthened production systems by monitoring pipelines, troubleshooting failures, implementing retry strategies, and introducing validation checkpoints to ensure uninterrupted data operations.

points.title: 📈 Business-Centric Data Modeling
points.desc: Designed Gold-layer fact and dimension models to support analytical use cases such as campaign performance tracking, revenue analysis, and customer behavior insights.

points.title: 🔄 Legacy Modernization & Cloud Migration
points.desc: Contributed to migration of legacy data systems to Snowflake by stabilizing existing workflows, redesigning ingestion patterns, and enabling scalable cloud-native architecture.

points.title: 🧠 Workflow Automation & Control Mechanisms
points.desc: Developed stored procedures for automated workflows including approval systems, idempotent processing, and controlled data promotion across layers.

points.title: 🤝 Cross-Functional Collaboration & Knowledge Enablement
points.desc: Facilitated reverse knowledge transfer, created SOPs, and collaborated with technical and non-technical teams to ensure smooth transitions and operational efficiency.
